data.body: STORY A change 699: PATCHSET 1 got LLM-Review+1 (PASS) but Verified-1. Root cause: CI's lean [dev] suite has NO fastapi ([ui] extra), and my index/bind tests called create_app()->import fastapi (server.py:80) => ModuleNotFoundError. FIX: added pytest.importorskip('fastapi'/'httpx'/'uvicorn') to ONLY the 2 app-building tests (config + CLI-behavior tests correctly need no web stack). CI-faithful sim (web stack blocked): 10 passed 2 skipped exit0; local (fastapi present): 12 passed. All drift gates had passed on PS1 (doc/golden/ceiling regen was correct). Amended (Change-Id preserved) + pushed PATCHSET 2 to change 699. Awaiting fresh Verified.
